title: Georga's Pack
description: A large package for vanilla games on SP as well as building design and YouTubers
body:
# Description
The mod pack I put together optimizes and adds new features to the game. You can now upload and create maps with pins, use worldedit, voice chat, and more. The pack contains useful mods that make the game more convenient and fun. I chose mods that don't conflict with each other for maximum efficiency and fewer bugs. I also added a small number of shaders and resource packs for an even more comfortable game.
![Screenshot 1 from the game](https://i.ibb.co/Jnc2kLD/2024-07-06-17-09-27.png)
## For construction
For Builders: Allows you to use WorldEdit to visualize selected blocks, create and use diagrams with Litematica, and randomize blocks.
![Screenshot 2 from the game](https://i.ibb.co/kh8xPQ4/2024-07-08-08-14-57.png)
## For YouTubers
For YouTubers: allows you to record everything that happens around you using Replay Mod and compile it into a video, as well as listen to voice chat in Replay Voice Chat.
![Screenshot 3 from the game](https://i.ibb.co/GM6nhjH/2024-07-08-081821599.png)
## For servers
For players on servers: Allows you to communicate in voice chat, custom item models, player avatars in chat.
![Screenshot 4 from the game](https://i.ibb.co/xgzjqp2/2024-07-08-08-21-21.png)
